events.text: Beat 1 — Connect. Watch the MCP handshake: a redacted OAuth token, initialize, then discovery. Three primitives, three colors: tools, resources, prompts.

tools.name: get_dataset
tools.title: Get dataset
tools.description: Fetch full dataset metadata by UUID.

tools.name: get_data_dictionary
tools.title: Get data dictionary

datasetOrResourceId.description: Dataset UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

tools.description: Resolve a dataset UUID or resource ID to its linked data-dictionary item(s) with field definitions.

dictionaries.description: Dictionary entries (identifier, url, title, fields) keyed by resource id.

tools.name: distinct_values
tools.title: Distinct column values

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Return the distinct values of one datastore column (code list / enum discovery before filtering); flags truncation.

tools.name: sample_rows
tools.title: Sample datastore rows

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Return the first N rows of a datastore resource in deterministic order — see real cell values and formats before composing filters.

tools.name: get_harvest_plan
tools.title: Get harvest plan
tools.description: Get the configuration (extract and load definitions) of a harvest plan.

tools.name: list_harvest_plans
tools.title: List harvest plans
tools.description: List all registered harvest plan IDs.

tools.name: get_harvest_run_result
tools.title: Get harvest run result

runId.description: Run ID/timestamp. Omit for the latest run.

tools.description: Get the detailed result for a harvest run. Omit runId for the latest run.

result.description: Raw harvest run result (plan config stripped).

tools.name: get_distribution
tools.title: Get distribution
tools.description: Fetch full distribution metadata by UUID.

tools.name: get_site_status
tools.title: Get site status
tools.description: Get a high-level DKAN site overview: dataset/distribution counts, formats, import status, harvest plans, and versions.

imports.description: Import-job states, one per unique datastore-backed resource. Distributions can lack a resource or share one (an import job belongs to a resource, not a distribution), so the buckets can sum below distributions.total.

sampled.description: Set when the import-status scan hit its resource cap.

tools.name: get_dataset_info
tools.title: Get dataset info
tools.description: Get aggregated dataset info (distributions, resources, and import status) for a dataset UUID.

dataset_info.description: Aggregated per-revision distribution and import info.

tools.name: get_datastore_schema
tools.title: Get datastore schema

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

includeDictionary.description: Enrich columns with linked data-dictionary metadata.

tools.description: Get the column names and types of a datastore resource. When a data dictionary is linked, columns are enriched with dictionary titles, descriptions, and types.

dictionary_identifier.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

dictionary_url.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.title: List schemas
tools.description: List available metastore schema IDs (dataset, distribution, data-dictionary, etc.).

tools.name: query_datastore
tools.title: Query datastore

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to return (omit for all).

conditions.description: JSON array of condition objects: [{"property":"col","value":"val","operator":"="}]. Operators: =, <>, <, <=, >, >=, like, contains, starts with, in, not in, between. Supports conditionGroup for OR logic: [{"groupOperator":"or","conditions":[...]}]

expressions.description: JSON array of expressions: [{"operator":"sum","operands":["column"],"alias":"total"}]. Aggregate operators: sum, count, avg, max, min (1 operand, use with groupings). Arithmetic operators: +, -, *, /, % (2 operands, row-level computed columns). Cannot mix aggregate and arithmetic in one query.

groupings.description: Comma-separated column names to GROUP BY. Required when using aggregate expressions. All non-aggregated columns must be listed here.

tools.description: Query a datastore resource table with optional filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation (sum, count, avg, max, min with GROUP BY), and arithmetic expressions (+, -, *, /, %). Use get_datastore_schema first to discover available columns.

tools.name: get_import_status
tools.title: Get import status

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Get the datastore import status (done/pending/not_imported) and row/column counts for a resource.

error.description: Import error detail; accompanies the status payload.

tools.name: list_distributions
tools.title: List distributions
tools.description: List all distributions in a dataset, including resource_id (identifier__version), title, mediaType, and download URL.

tools.name: search_columns
tools.title: Search columns

searchTerm.description: Text to search for in column names/descriptions.

tools.description: Search datastore column names and/or descriptions across imported resources in the catalog.

matches_truncated.description: Set when the match limit was hit.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.title: Get schema

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. dataset, distribution, data-dictionary).

tools.description: Get a JSON Schema definition by schema ID (from list_schemas).

tools.name: get_harvest_runs
tools.title: Get harvest runs
tools.description: Get the run history for a harvest plan: per-run extract/load status and counts, including each run ID.

runs.description: Raw run results (plan config stripped) plus run_id, newest first.

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.title: List datasets
tools.description: List dataset summaries (identifier, title, truncated description, distribution count) with pagination.

tools.name: query_datastore_join
tools.title: Query datastore (join)

resourceId.description: Primary resource ID in identifier__version format (alias "t").

joinResourceId.description: Resource ID to join in identifier__version format (alias "j").

joinOn.description: Join condition as "col1=col2" shorthand or a JSON object.

columns.description: Comma-separated (optionally resource-qualified, e.g. t.col,j.col) columns to return (omit for all).

expressions.description: JSON array of aggregate or arithmetic expressions (see query_datastore).

groupings.description: Comma-separated columns to GROUP BY (required with aggregate expressions).

tools.description: Join two datastore resources on a column and query the result with filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation, and expressions. Use resource-qualified columns (t.col, j.col).

tools.name: get_datastore_stats
tools.title: Get datastore stats

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to limit stats to (omit for all).

tools.description: Per-column statistics (null count, distinct count, min, max) for a datastore resource.

columns_truncated.description: Set when the column cap was hit.

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.title: Get catalog
tools.description: Get the full DCAT data catalog (descriptions truncated, spatial fields removed).

dataset_count.description: Only on the catalog-too-large error branch.

tools.name: get_queue_status
tools.title: Get queue status

queueName.description: Specific queue worker name (e.g. datastore_import). Omit for all DKAN queues.

tools.description: Get item counts for DKAN-related queues. Omit queueName for all DKAN queues.

tools.name: search_datasets
tools.title: Search datasets
tools.description: Search datasets by keyword via the DKAN search API, with pagination.

tools.name: resolve_resource
tools.title: Resolve resource

id.description: Distribution UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

tools.description: Trace a resource chain: distribution UUID or resource ID to its perspectives, datastore table, import status, and owning dataset.

events.text: Beat 2 — Manual mode. search_datasets fired by hand from a form generated from its inputSchema. No model involved: it's just a typed function over HTTP.

results.title: Florida Bike Lanes
results.description: A geospatial dataset containing designated bike lane segments across Florida roadways. Each record represents a single bike lane segment and includes its roadway code, position along the road measured

events.text: Beat 3 — Agent mode. Same tool, but now the MODEL chooses to call it. Watch the loop: context → model → tool call → JSON-RPC → result → back into the loop.
What bike lane data do you have? Give me a short summary of the Florida Bike Lanes dataset.

{
    "resource_id": "3a187a87dc6cd47c48b6b4c4785224b7__1780338334",
    "columns": [
        {
            "name": "objectid",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "﻿OBJECTID",
            "dictionary_title": "Object ID",
            "dictionary_description": "REVIEWER DICTIONARY EDIT: stable unique row identifier assigned by the source GIS system.",
            "dictionary_type": "integer"
        },
        {
            "name": "roadway",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "ROADWAY",
            "dictionary_title": "Roadway Code",
            "dictionary_description": "Code identifying the roadway on which the bike lane is located.",
            "dictionary_type": "string"
        },
        {
            "name": "road_side",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "ROAD_SIDE",
            "dictionary_title": "Road Side",
            "dictionary_description": "Indicates which side of the roadway the bike lane is on, using values such as 'L' for left or 'R' for right.",
            "dictionary_type": "string"
        },
        {
            "name": "lncd",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "LNCD",
            "dictionary_title": "Lane Code",
            "dictionary_description": "Code identifying the lane type or classification of the bike lane.",
            "dictionary_type": "string"
        },
        {
            "name": "descr",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "DESCR",
            "dictionary_title": "Description",
            "dictionary_description": "Description of the bike lane type, such as 'DESIGNATED' for officially marked bike lanes.",
            "dictionary_type": "string"
        },
        {
            "name": "begin_post",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "BEGIN_POST",
            "dictionary_title": "Begin Post",
            "dictionary_description": "Starting position or milepost of the bike lane segment along the roadway.",
            "dictionary_type": "number"
        },
        {
            "name": "end_post",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "END_POST",
            "dictionary_title": "End Post",
            "dictionary_description": "Ending position or milepost of the bike lane segment along the roadway.",
            "dictionary_type": "number"
        },
        {
            "name": "shape_leng",
            "type": "text",
            "description": "Shape_Leng",
            "dictionary_title": "Shape Length",
            "dictionary_description": "Length of the bike lane segment in linear units, typically feet or meters.",
            "dictionary_type": "number"
        }
    ],
    "dictionary_identifier": "5cad4317-ad22-4a03-9d50-b6a66f567200",
    "dictionary_url": "https://dkan-site.ddev.site/api/1/metastore/schemas/data-dictionary/items/5cad4317-ad22-4a03-9d50-b6a66f567200"
}

blocks.summary: You are a DKAN open-data assistant. Use the MCP tools to answer questions about the catalog.

events.text:
## Bike Lane Data Available

The catalog currently has one bike-lane related dataset: **Florida Bike Lanes**.

### Summary

- **Title:** Florida Bike Lanes
- **Publisher:** State Economic Council
- **Coverage:** Florida (statewide roadways)
- **Themes:** Transportation, City Planning
- **Issued/Modified:** June 22, 2016
- **License:** Open Data Commons Attribution License
- **Description:** A geospatial dataset of designated bike lane segments across Florida roadways. Each record represents one bike lane segment, including the roadway it's on, its position (mileposts), physical length, and which side of the road it's on.
- **Format:** Single CSV distribution (`Bike_Lane.csv`), fully imported into the datastore — **2,969 rows / 9 columns**

**Key fields:**
| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| Object ID | Unique row identifier from source GIS system |
| Roadway Code | Identifies the roadway the bike lane is on |
| Road Side | Which side of the road (L/R) |
| Lane Code | Classification/type code for the lane |
| Description | e.g., "DESIGNATED" for officially marked bike lanes |
| Begin Post / End Post | Start/end milepost marking the segment's location |
| Shape Length | Length of the segment (feet/meters) |

Let me know if you'd like me to query specific roadways, segment lengths, or pull sample records from the dataset.
Beat 4 — Prompts are user-controlled. /explore_dataset expands server-side, and the expansion is shown BEFORE anything is sent to a model.

content.text:
Explore DKAN dataset cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 and give me an overview.

1. Call get_dataset with id cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 for title, description, and distributions.
2. Call get_data_dictionary for cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 to learn the column titles and types.
3. Pick the dataset's main distribution, then call query_datastore with its resource_id and a small limit to sample the data.

Summarize what the dataset contains, list its columns with meanings, and note any sanity_flags from the query.

messages.content:
Explore DKAN dataset cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 and give me an overview.

1. Call get_dataset with id cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 for title, description, and distributions.
2. Call get_data_dictionary for cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55 to learn the column titles and types.
3. Pick the dataset's main distribution, then call query_datastore with its resource_id and a small limit to sample the data.

Summarize what the dataset contains, list its columns with meanings, and note any sanity_flags from the query.

events.text: Beat 5 — Resources are app-controlled. The app reads the dataset's DCAT-US metadata and attaches it; the context snapshot shows exactly what the model receives.

contents.text: {"dataset":{"@type":"dcat:Dataset","accessLevel":"public","contactPoint":{"fn":"Jane Doe","hasEmail":"mailto:data.admin@example.com"},"description":"A geospatial dataset containing designated bike lane segments across Florida roadways. Each record represents a single bike lane segment and includes its roadway code, position along the road measured in mileposts, physical length, and which side of the roadway it occupies. REVIEWER EDIT MARKER: trimmed for clarity during human review.","distribution":[{"@type":"dcat:Distribution","downloadURL":"https://dkan-site.ddev.site/sites/default/files/distribution/cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55/Bike_Lane.csv","mediaType":"text/csv","format":"csv","title":"Florida Bike Lanes","describedBy":"https://dkan-site.ddev.site/api/1/metastore/schemas/data-dictionary/items/5cad4317-ad22-4a03-9d50-b6a66f567200","describedByType":"application/vnd.tableschema+json"}],"identifier":"cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55","issued":"2016-06-22","license":"http://opendatacommons.org/licenses/by/1.0/","modified":"2016-06-22","publisher":{"@type":"org:Organization","name":"State Economic Council"},"spatial":"Florida","theme":["Transportation","City Planning"],"title":"Florida Bike Lanes ","keyword":["bike lanes","cycling infrastructure","florida roads","reviewer edit keyword"]}}

blocks.summary: You are a DKAN open-data assistant. Use the MCP tools to answer questions about the catalog.

events.text: Beat 6 — Persona switch. A new token, a new MCP session — and 13 more tools appear. The MCP surface is permission-dependent, driven by Drupal's own permission system.

tools.name: import_resource
tools.title: Import resource

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions), or a distribution UUID.

deferred.description: Queue for background processing instead of running inline.

tools.description: Trigger a datastore import for a resource, inline or queued for background processing.

import_result.description: Raw DKAN import results, keyed by pipeline stage.

tools.name: patch_metastore_item
tools.title: Patch metastore item

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. dataset, data-dictionary, distribution).

metadata.description: JSON object string with only the fields to change. The identifier cannot be changed.

tools.description: Partial update of any metastore item via JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7396).

tools.name: get_dataset
tools.title: Get dataset
tools.description: Fetch full dataset metadata by UUID.

tools.name: get_data_dictionary
tools.title: Get data dictionary

datasetOrResourceId.description: Dataset UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

tools.description: Resolve a dataset UUID or resource ID to its linked data-dictionary item(s) with field definitions.

dictionaries.description: Dictionary entries (identifier, url, title, fields) keyed by resource id.

tools.name: distinct_values
tools.title: Distinct column values

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Return the distinct values of one datastore column (code list / enum discovery before filtering); flags truncation.

tools.name: drop_datastore
tools.title: Drop datastore

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions), or a distribution UUID.

tools.description: Drop the datastore table for a resource (the metadata remains; re-import to rebuild).

tools.name: post_metastore_item
tools.title: Post metastore item

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. dataset, data-dictionary, distribution).

metadata.description: Complete item metadata as a JSON object string, including identifier and the schema's required fields.

tools.description: Create a metastore item under any schema (dataset, data-dictionary, distribution, theme, keyword, etc.).

tools.name: sample_rows
tools.title: Sample datastore rows

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Return the first N rows of a datastore resource in deterministic order — see real cell values and formats before composing filters.

tools.name: get_harvest_plan
tools.title: Get harvest plan
tools.description: Get the configuration (extract and load definitions) of a harvest plan.

tools.name: list_harvest_plans
tools.title: List harvest plans
tools.description: List all registered harvest plan IDs.

tools.name: get_harvest_run_result
tools.title: Get harvest run result

runId.description: Run ID/timestamp. Omit for the latest run.

tools.description: Get the detailed result for a harvest run. Omit runId for the latest run.

result.description: Raw harvest run result (plan config stripped).

tools.name: get_distribution
tools.title: Get distribution
tools.description: Fetch full distribution metadata by UUID.

tools.name: get_site_status
tools.title: Get site status
tools.description: Get a high-level DKAN site overview: dataset/distribution counts, formats, import status, harvest plans, and versions.

imports.description: Import-job states, one per unique datastore-backed resource. Distributions can lack a resource or share one (an import job belongs to a resource, not a distribution), so the buckets can sum below distributions.total.

sampled.description: Set when the import-status scan hit its resource cap.

tools.name: get_dataset_info
tools.title: Get dataset info
tools.description: Get aggregated dataset info (distributions, resources, and import status) for a dataset UUID.

dataset_info.description: Aggregated per-revision distribution and import info.

tools.name: get_datastore_schema
tools.title: Get datastore schema

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

includeDictionary.description: Enrich columns with linked data-dictionary metadata.

tools.description: Get the column names and types of a datastore resource. When a data dictionary is linked, columns are enriched with dictionary titles, descriptions, and types.

dictionary_identifier.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

dictionary_url.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

tools.name: run_harvest
tools.title: Run harvest
tools.description: Execute a harvest run for a registered plan.

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.title: List schemas
tools.description: List available metastore schema IDs (dataset, distribution, data-dictionary, etc.).

tools.name: query_datastore
tools.title: Query datastore

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to return (omit for all).

conditions.description: JSON array of condition objects: [{"property":"col","value":"val","operator":"="}]. Operators: =, <>, <, <=, >, >=, like, contains, starts with, in, not in, between. Supports conditionGroup for OR logic: [{"groupOperator":"or","conditions":[...]}]

expressions.description: JSON array of expressions: [{"operator":"sum","operands":["column"],"alias":"total"}]. Aggregate operators: sum, count, avg, max, min (1 operand, use with groupings). Arithmetic operators: +, -, *, /, % (2 operands, row-level computed columns). Cannot mix aggregate and arithmetic in one query.

groupings.description: Comma-separated column names to GROUP BY. Required when using aggregate expressions. All non-aggregated columns must be listed here.

tools.description: Query a datastore resource table with optional filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation (sum, count, avg, max, min with GROUP BY), and arithmetic expressions (+, -, *, /, %). Use get_datastore_schema first to discover available columns.

tools.name: deregister_harvest
tools.title: Deregister harvest
tools.description: Remove a registered harvest plan.

tools.name: delete_dataset
tools.title: Delete dataset
tools.description: Remove a dataset and cascade-delete its distributions and datastore tables.

tools.name: get_import_status
tools.title: Get import status

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Get the datastore import status (done/pending/not_imported) and row/column counts for a resource.

error.description: Import error detail; accompanies the status payload.

tools.name: list_distributions
tools.title: List distributions
tools.description: List all distributions in a dataset, including resource_id (identifier__version), title, mediaType, and download URL.

tools.name: patch_dataset
tools.title: Patch dataset

metadata.description: JSON object string with only the fields to change. The identifier cannot be changed.

tools.description: Partially update dataset metadata via JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7396).

tools.name: search_columns
tools.title: Search columns

searchTerm.description: Text to search for in column names/descriptions.

tools.description: Search datastore column names and/or descriptions across imported resources in the catalog.

matches_truncated.description: Set when the match limit was hit.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.title: Get schema

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. dataset, distribution, data-dictionary).

tools.description: Get a JSON Schema definition by schema ID (from list_schemas).

tools.name: publish_dataset
tools.title: Publish dataset
tools.description: Publish a dataset to make it publicly visible.

tools.name: get_harvest_runs
tools.title: Get harvest runs
tools.description: Get the run history for a harvest plan: per-run extract/load status and counts, including each run ID.

runs.description: Raw run results (plan config stripped) plus run_id, newest first.

tools.name: update_dataset
tools.title: Update dataset

metadata.description: Complete dataset metadata as a JSON object string.

tools.description: Full replacement of dataset metadata (PUT/upsert).

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.title: List datasets
tools.description: List dataset summaries (identifier, title, truncated description, distribution count) with pagination.

tools.name: register_harvest
tools.title: Register harvest

plan.description: Harvest plan as a JSON object string with identifier, extract, and load properties.

tools.description: Register a new harvest plan from a JSON definition (identifier, extract, load).

tools.name: query_datastore_join
tools.title: Query datastore (join)

resourceId.description: Primary resource ID in identifier__version format (alias "t").

joinResourceId.description: Resource ID to join in identifier__version format (alias "j").

joinOn.description: Join condition as "col1=col2" shorthand or a JSON object.

columns.description: Comma-separated (optionally resource-qualified, e.g. t.col,j.col) columns to return (omit for all).

expressions.description: JSON array of aggregate or arithmetic expressions (see query_datastore).

groupings.description: Comma-separated columns to GROUP BY (required with aggregate expressions).

tools.description: Join two datastore resources on a column and query the result with filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation, and expressions. Use resource-qualified columns (t.col, j.col).

tools.name: unpublish_dataset
tools.title: Unpublish dataset
tools.description: Archive (unpublish) a dataset so it is no longer publicly visible.

tools.name: get_datastore_stats
tools.title: Get datastore stats

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to limit stats to (omit for all).

tools.description: Per-column statistics (null count, distinct count, min, max) for a datastore resource.

columns_truncated.description: Set when the column cap was hit.

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.title: Get catalog
tools.description: Get the full DCAT data catalog (descriptions truncated, spatial fields removed).

dataset_count.description: Only on the catalog-too-large error branch.

tools.name: get_queue_status
tools.title: Get queue status

queueName.description: Specific queue worker name (e.g. datastore_import). Omit for all DKAN queues.

tools.description: Get item counts for DKAN-related queues. Omit queueName for all DKAN queues.

tools.name: delete_metastore_item
tools.title: Delete metastore item

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. data-dictionary, distribution, theme, keyword).

tools.description: Delete any non-dataset metastore item by schema and identifier. DKAN does not reference-check: deleting a still-linked item orphans its references — verify usage first (get_data_dictionary, resolve_resource). Use delete_dataset for datasets.

tools.name: search_datasets
tools.title: Search datasets
tools.description: Search datasets by keyword via the DKAN search API, with pagination.

tools.name: resolve_resource
tools.title: Resolve resource

id.description: Distribution UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

tools.description: Trace a resource chain: distribution UUID or resource ID to its perspectives, datastore table, import status, and owning dataset.

events.text: Beat 7 — Back to read-only, and ask the agent to CHANGE something. It can't: update_dataset was never in its tools/list, so the model has nothing to call.

tools.name: get_harvest_plan
tools.title: Get harvest plan
tools.description: Get the configuration (extract and load definitions) of a harvest plan.

tools.name: list_harvest_plans
tools.title: List harvest plans
tools.description: List all registered harvest plan IDs.

tools.name: get_harvest_run_result
tools.title: Get harvest run result

runId.description: Run ID/timestamp. Omit for the latest run.

tools.description: Get the detailed result for a harvest run. Omit runId for the latest run.

result.description: Raw harvest run result (plan config stripped).

tools.name: get_distribution
tools.title: Get distribution
tools.description: Fetch full distribution metadata by UUID.

tools.name: get_site_status
tools.title: Get site status
tools.description: Get a high-level DKAN site overview: dataset/distribution counts, formats, import status, harvest plans, and versions.

imports.description: Import-job states, one per unique datastore-backed resource. Distributions can lack a resource or share one (an import job belongs to a resource, not a distribution), so the buckets can sum below distributions.total.

sampled.description: Set when the import-status scan hit its resource cap.

tools.name: get_dataset_info
tools.title: Get dataset info
tools.description: Get aggregated dataset info (distributions, resources, and import status) for a dataset UUID.

dataset_info.description: Aggregated per-revision distribution and import info.

tools.name: get_datastore_schema
tools.title: Get datastore schema

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

includeDictionary.description: Enrich columns with linked data-dictionary metadata.

tools.description: Get the column names and types of a datastore resource. When a data dictionary is linked, columns are enriched with dictionary titles, descriptions, and types.

dictionary_identifier.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

dictionary_url.description: Set when a data dictionary is linked.

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.title: List schemas
tools.description: List available metastore schema IDs (dataset, distribution, data-dictionary, etc.).

tools.name: query_datastore
tools.title: Query datastore

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to return (omit for all).

conditions.description: JSON array of condition objects: [{"property":"col","value":"val","operator":"="}]. Operators: =, <>, <, <=, >, >=, like, contains, starts with, in, not in, between. Supports conditionGroup for OR logic: [{"groupOperator":"or","conditions":[...]}]

expressions.description: JSON array of expressions: [{"operator":"sum","operands":["column"],"alias":"total"}]. Aggregate operators: sum, count, avg, max, min (1 operand, use with groupings). Arithmetic operators: +, -, *, /, % (2 operands, row-level computed columns). Cannot mix aggregate and arithmetic in one query.

groupings.description: Comma-separated column names to GROUP BY. Required when using aggregate expressions. All non-aggregated columns must be listed here.

tools.description: Query a datastore resource table with optional filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation (sum, count, avg, max, min with GROUP BY), and arithmetic expressions (+, -, *, /, %). Use get_datastore_schema first to discover available columns.

tools.name: get_import_status
tools.title: Get import status

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

tools.description: Get the datastore import status (done/pending/not_imported) and row/column counts for a resource.

error.description: Import error detail; accompanies the status payload.

tools.name: list_distributions
tools.title: List distributions
tools.description: List all distributions in a dataset, including resource_id (identifier__version), title, mediaType, and download URL.

tools.name: search_columns
tools.title: Search columns

searchTerm.description: Text to search for in column names/descriptions.

tools.description: Search datastore column names and/or descriptions across imported resources in the catalog.

matches_truncated.description: Set when the match limit was hit.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.title: Get schema

schemaId.description: Metastore schema ID (e.g. dataset, distribution, data-dictionary).

tools.description: Get a JSON Schema definition by schema ID (from list_schemas).

tools.name: get_harvest_runs
tools.title: Get harvest runs
tools.description: Get the run history for a harvest plan: per-run extract/load status and counts, including each run ID.

runs.description: Raw run results (plan config stripped) plus run_id, newest first.

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.title: List datasets
tools.description: List dataset summaries (identifier, title, truncated description, distribution count) with pagination.

tools.name: query_datastore_join
tools.title: Query datastore (join)

resourceId.description: Primary resource ID in identifier__version format (alias "t").

joinResourceId.description: Resource ID to join in identifier__version format (alias "j").

joinOn.description: Join condition as "col1=col2" shorthand or a JSON object.

columns.description: Comma-separated (optionally resource-qualified, e.g. t.col,j.col) columns to return (omit for all).

expressions.description: JSON array of aggregate or arithmetic expressions (see query_datastore).

groupings.description: Comma-separated columns to GROUP BY (required with aggregate expressions).

tools.description: Join two datastore resources on a column and query the result with filters, sorting, pagination, aggregation, and expressions. Use resource-qualified columns (t.col, j.col).

tools.name: get_datastore_stats
tools.title: Get datastore stats

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

columns.description: Comma-separated column names to limit stats to (omit for all).

tools.description: Per-column statistics (null count, distinct count, min, max) for a datastore resource.

columns_truncated.description: Set when the column cap was hit.

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.title: Get catalog
tools.description: Get the full DCAT data catalog (descriptions truncated, spatial fields removed).

dataset_count.description: Only on the catalog-too-large error branch.

tools.name: get_queue_status
tools.title: Get queue status

queueName.description: Specific queue worker name (e.g. datastore_import). Omit for all DKAN queues.

tools.description: Get item counts for DKAN-related queues. Omit queueName for all DKAN queues.

tools.name: search_datasets
tools.title: Search datasets
tools.description: Search datasets by keyword via the DKAN search API, with pagination.

tools.name: resolve_resource
tools.title: Resolve resource

id.description: Distribution UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

tools.description: Trace a resource chain: distribution UUID or resource ID to its perspectives, datastore table, import status, and owning dataset.

items.name: get_dataset
items.title: Get dataset
items.description: Fetch full dataset metadata by UUID.

items.name: get_data_dictionary
items.title: Get data dictionary
items.description: Resolve a dataset UUID or resource ID to its linked data-dictionary item(s) with field definitions.

datasetOrResourceId.description: Dataset UUID or resource ID in identifier__version format.

items.name: distinct_values
items.title: Distinct column values
items.description: Return the distinct values of one datastore column (code list / enum discovery before filtering); flags truncation.

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

items.name: sample_rows
items.title: Sample datastore rows
items.description: Return the first N rows of a datastore resource in deterministic order — see real cell values and formats before composing filters.

resourceId.description: Resource ID in identifier__version format (from list_distributions).

events.text: Change the title of the Florida Bike Lanes dataset to 'Florida Bike Lanes 2026'.

blocks.summary: You are a DKAN open-data assistant. Use the MCP tools to answer questions about the catalog.
Change the title of the Florida Bike Lanes dataset to 'Florida Bike Lanes 2026'.

events.text:
I'm not able to modify or write data in the catalog — my tools are read-only (searching, fetching metadata, and querying datastore resources). I can't rename the dataset title for you.

To make that change, you'd need to use the DKAN admin interface or the metastore API's PATCH/PUT endpoint for datasets, e.g.:

```
PATCH /api/1/metastore/schemas/dataset/items/cedcd327-4e5d-43f9-8eb1-c11850fa7c55
{
  "title": "Florida Bike Lanes 2026"
}
```

If you have access to the DKAN admin UI, you can also edit the dataset node directly and update the title field there.

Would you like me to do anything else, like pull more details from the dataset to help prep that update?
Defense in depth: force-call the hidden tool anyway. HTTP 403, JSON-RPC -32002 — hidden from the list AND denied at the protocol level.
That's the whole story: tools are model-controlled, prompts are user-controlled, resources are app-controlled — and everything you watched is one append-only event log.
